question: PE
claim: Transport idempotency: the save-receipt is stored after+outside the txn, so a commit-then-die replay duplicates the secondary index. Thread the idempotency token through the daemon IPC into the save handler.

question: PE
claim: Fingerprint-absence -> WARN: the freshness gate skip-PASSes on an absent/zero fingerprint. Promote to WARN. ~667 impl-summaries lack one; the whole check is default-OFF, so gate the flip behind a backfill.
